$comment: Mobile Input Form Label Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Input Form Label component - the label row that sits above an input field, composed of the label text, an optional mandatory (required) asterisk, and an optional info icon. Supports default and disabled states across 6 sizes (3xs, 2xs, xs, sm, md, lg). Figma Reference: Node ID 5475-99880

$component.name: Input Form Label
$component.description: A mobile form component that labels an input field. Combines the label text with an optional red asterisk for required fields and an optional info icon for contextual help. Renders in a default state and a muted disabled state.
$component.structure: Horizontal container with label text, optional mandatory asterisk, and optional info icon, separated by a 4px gap

sizes.3xs: Extra small size - label 11px (font/size/xs), info icon 10px
sizes.2xs: Extra small size - label 12px (font/size/sm), info icon 10px

variants.default: Neutral label with gray text, red mandatory asterisk, and gray info icon
variants.disabled: Disabled state with muted gray colors when the form field is disabled

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, registration screens, login forms, settings panels, data entry interfaces, profile forms
usage.features: Label text, optional required-field asterisk, optional info icon, default and disabled states

gap.$comment: Spacing token for mobile input form label - gap between label text, mandatory asterisk, and info icon
gap.description: Mobile input form label gap between label text, asterisk, and info icon - 4px

text.$comment: Typography and color tokens for the mobile input form label text

3xs.description: Mobile input form label typography for 3xs size - Medium 11px/16px

2xs.description: Mobile input form label typography for 2xs size - Medium 12px/17px

xs.description: Mobile input form label typography for xs size - Medium 13px/18px

sm.description: Mobile input form label typography for sm size - Medium 14px/20px

md.description: Mobile input form label typography for md size - Medium 16px/24px

lg.description: Mobile input form label typography for lg size - Medium 16px/24px

default.description: Mobile input form label default text color - gray/700 - #344054

disabled.description: Mobile input form label disabled text color - gray/400 - #98a2b3

mandatory.$comment: Color tokens for the required-field asterisk in the mobile input form label

default.description: Mobile input form label mandatory asterisk default color - error/600 - #d92d20

disabled.description: Mobile input form label mandatory asterisk disabled color - gray/400 - #98a2b3

info-icon.$comment: Size and color tokens for the optional info icon in the mobile input form label

3xs.description: Mobile input form label info icon size for 3xs size - 10px
